title: JSON schema for Helsingborg Styleguide Components

apiVersion.description: The version of the component API this component uses.

state.description: The development state of the component.

name.description: This is the display title for your component.

slug.description: The name of the component. The name may only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes, and must begin with a letter. The name must be unique across all registered components.

description.description: This is a short description for your component.

tags.description: This is an array of tags that can be used to categorize the component.

similarComponents.description: An array of component slugs that are similar to this component.

standalone.description: Indicates if the component can be used without any other component as a parent.

icon.description: Optional icon identifier for this component.

tokens.description: This is an array of tokens that the component uses. Token names correspond to CSS custom property names from design-tokens.json with the leading '--' stripped.

componentSettings.description: Optional component-local design builder controls. Settings are declared without the component prefix and will be localized automatically, for example '--font-size-multiplier' becomes '--c-brand--font-size-multiplier'.

requires.description: An array of component slugs that this component depends on.

requiredBy.description: An array of component slugs that depend on this component.
